metadata.experiment_name: CWA Unnormalized MLP Depth Sweep + Fixed-J Ablation
metadata.hypothesis_tested: CWA provides gradient stability via near-critical J*s_bar; fixed-J ablation tests mechanism
metadata.verdict_reason: mechanism confirmed via fixed-J (J0.7/0.9 grad_ratio=0.364 < 2.0); but accuracy advantage only on 0/3 depths
key_findings: Depth 6: CWA acc=0.4826 vs GELU acc=0.5309; grad_ratio: CWA=0.3047 vs GELU=0.7119
Depth 10: CWA acc=0.4716 vs GELU acc=0.5113; grad_ratio: CWA=0.3473 vs GELU=0.7345
Depth 20: CWA acc=0.1413 vs GELU acc=0.3056; grad_ratio: CWA=11.0173 vs GELU=2.7614
Learned CWA at depth 10: J*s_bar converges to ~0.285
